title: Integrated negative routine task
objective: Usar afirmaciones, negaciones y respuestas cortas en conversación.

activities.prompt: I work on Saturdays, but I don't work on Sundays.
I don't eat meat. She doesn't eat fish. They don't cook at home.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Marca don't y doesn't sin separar las palabras.

activities.prompt: Tom works during the week, but he doesn't work on Saturday. He doesn't drive.
activities.question: When doesn't Tom work?
activities.feedback_correct: La respuesta está en la primera negación.

activities.prompt: Write eight sentences: four things you do and four things you do not do.
activities.feedback_correct: La rutina distingue acciones y límites.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa el auxiliar según el sujeto.

activities.prompt: Discuss food, work and weekend habits with the AI. Say what you do and do not do.
activities.feedback_correct: La IA evalúa claridad y precisión.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA ofrece una corrección prioritaria.

activities.prompt: Say five things you do and five things you do not do.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Organiza la presentación en do y don't.

activities.prompt: Describe your routine, contrast five habits and answer negative questions.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Repasa el auxiliar relacionado con el sujeto.
